headline: Tether Stake Sale Imminent: $10B Valuation At Risk

article.title: Former Tether CIO seeks to sell stake in stablecoin issuer, Bloomberg reports
article.summary: The reported transaction comes as Tether maintains it has no plans to go public, even as other crypto companies pursue or delay IPOs.

headline: Bitcoin Surges 5% as Funding Rates Hit 9%

article.title: Bitcoin recovers from Strategy's BTC sale, funding rates hit 9%: Are bulls back?
article.summary: Bitcoin sold off as news of Strategy selling BTC shook investors’ nerve but the quick rebound suggests bulls remain ambitiously positioned.

headline: Oil Slumps 4% on Saudi Price Cut Amid Glut

article.title: Oil Holds Drop as Saudi Arabian Price Cut Amplifies Glut Concern
article.summary: Oil held a drop on signs of growing oversupply, with Saudi Arabia slashing prices and traffic through the Strait of Hormuz picking up.

headline: Samsung Q2 Profit Surges 25% on AI Demand

article.title: Samsung Scores Profit Beat Due to Runaway Demand for AI Memory
article.summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold, soaring past elevated expectations due to rocketing demand for memory chips needed in AI data centers.
